title: POPRUN 2026 Diary Week to View Spiral A5+ 17.5x21.5 cm - Vertical Weekly Planner with 1/2 Hourly Appointments, Monthly Tabs, 100 GSM Paper, PU Leather Softcover, Sunday Start - Ink Blue
features: 12-MONTH APPOINTMENT PLANNER: This POPORUN weekly planner can be used for up to 12 months (from January 2026 to December 2026). Whether you want to record your daily appointments or organise your everyday life, this calendar is a good choice.
WEEKLY PLAN/MONTHLY PLAN: 1 week 2 page weekly calendar provides a complete and clear weekly overview (From Monday to Sunday). Each monthly plan includes a monthly overview and a notes section.
PERSONALISED DESIGN: This diary contains many practical functions. Ribbon bookmark | Foldable paper pocket | Tear-off corners | Self-adhesive pen loop | International holidays etc.
SMOOTH WRITING EXPERIENCE: The use of premium 100 GSM acid-free ivory paper makes writing silky smooth and ink-resistant, giving you the ultimate writing experience.
Close to A5 size: Lightweight and portable, helps you achieve your work or study goals efficiently.
